patch_type: Evidence state transition prototype over V60 Trust Evidence Workbench
release_chain_status: V60.1 is the current implemented build. It loads after V60 in src/ui/v52-7-operational-layer.js. It shows how evidence moves from weak states to verified_by_human with required human action, required documentation, risk if skipped, and Proof Pack consequence. GitHub Pages browser QA is required after deploy.
top_level_tab_rule: Do not add more top-level tabs. Upgrade existing workspaces only.
public_naming_rule: Public product name is CyberShield Executive OS. Current prototype build is V60.1. Do not call the public build CyberShield OS v8 unless the repo, README, loader, Settings/admin metadata, and public UX intentionally move to that version scheme.
controlling_doctrine: No score without a model. No model without evidence. No evidence without traceability. No action without consequence.
v60_1_changes: shows allowed and blocked evidence state transitions
shows required human action per transition
preserves V59 Internet Trust Engine scaffold and guardrails
preserves V56 Trust Model Registry and Evidence Register chain

evidence_state_transitions.boundary: Static advisory prototype only. No backend persistence, live evidence retrieval, automated verification, workflow automation, ticketing, notifications, or enforcement is performed.

recommended_next_build.label: V60.2 Evidence-to-Score Impact Preview
goals: show how evidence state transitions would affect trust score
show how transitions would affect confidence
show how transitions would affect reliance risk
show how transitions would affect runtime admissibility
show how transitions would affect Proof Pack defensibility
preserve prototype boundaries and avoid live scoring claims

implemented_release_train.v56: Trust Model Registry and Score Explanation Layer
implemented_release_train.v59.5: Internet Trust QA and Copy Guardrail Pass

prototype_boundary: The current GitHub Pages build is a lightweight static advisory prototype. It is not connected to live enterprise telemetry, SIEM, EDR, IAM, Microsoft 365, cloud control planes, GRC tooling, production agent enforcement, Google Sheets, CRM sync, ticketing, notifications, marketplace systems, ad platforms, domain-intelligence systems, identity verification systems, CMMC certification systems, healthcare compliance validation systems, banking/payment systems, live monitoring, live URL ingestion, live internet retrieval, live evidence retrieval, live scoring, live claim extraction, internet claim verification, report delivery, ticketing, workflow automation, notifications, backend persistence, or takedown automation.
known_limitations: Evidence State Transition Prototype is static
V60.1 does not persist evidence to a backend
V60.1 does not retrieve live evidence
V60.1 does not perform live verification
V60.1 does not create tickets or send notifications
V60.1 does not perform workflow automation
GitHub Pages browser QA required after deploy
